---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: "OOH Session #133...<br>[Code Appendices]{.glitch  style='font-size:2em;'}"
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: https://store.hp.com/app/assets/images/uploads/prod/level-up-your-hacker-lingo-hero1540855008473.jpg 
  data-background-opacity: ".6"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1b/R_logo.svg/3840px-R_logo.svg.png #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #132
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[Code Appendices]{.glitch .bigger}](https://github.com/cl-roberts/code-appendix)
+ Shared problem-solving

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>



:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/6_2_26">
  <img src="/img/title132.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#132: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://cdn.creazilla.com/cliparts/7754652/accordion-clipart-xl.png){.absolute top="290" right="112" height="180"}

## {{< iconify noto:accordion >}}[[Accordion folding]{.frijole}](https://github.com/royfrancis/quarto-accordion){{< iconify fluent-emoji-flat:accordion >}}

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Accessing {{< iconify streamline-emojis:locked-with-key >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

1. Inspect [{{< iconify octicon:lockup-github-24 style="color:#ffffff;" >}} repository](https://github.com/royfrancis/quarto-accordion)

2. ([within project directory](https://martinctc.github.io/blog/rstudio-projects-and-working-directories-a-beginner%27s-guide/)), type into {{< iconify devicon:rstudio >}} terminal:

```{r}
quarto add royfrancis/quarto-accordion
```

:::

:::{.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

{{< accordion header="Wanna see something?" body="![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExd3BnZ2poa3Q5Nm9odjMzcGk4OWQ2emdka2E3eTRzcmx2dDVid21vMiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/l41lOzTIL8lfZ15fy/giphy.gif)" >}}

:::

:::

### Implementing {{< iconify line-md:uploading-loop >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

#### [YAML:](https://github.com/royfrancis/quarto-accordion#yaml-metadata)

````{r}
---
title: Accordion
accordion:
  - accordion-1:          #<1>
    - header: Click here to view contents
      body: This is the body content
      collapsed: true
      id: custom-item-1
---

{{< accordion accordion-1 >}}
````
1. Use this `label` (here "accordion-1") to execute content within body of document (e.g., on line #11)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

#### [in--line:](https://github.com/royfrancis/quarto-accordion#inline-content)

````{r}
{{< accordion 
  header="Click here to view contents" 
  body="This is the body content" 
  collapsed=true 
  id="custom-item-1" >}}                #<1>
````
1. id's are auto--generated but can also be manually specified if desired. Seemingly most useful for direct links

{{< accordion header="Click here to view contents" body="This is the body content" collapsed=true id="custom-item-1" >}} 
  
:::

:::

### Tweaking {{< iconify vscode-icons:folder-type-tools >}}

Help pages have a section on [css styling](https://www.royfrancis.com/quarto-accordion/usage.html#css-styling) -- AI can help craft styling specifications

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

```{css}

/* Blue accordion styling */
.quarto-accordion .accordion-item {
  background-color: white;          
  border-color: black;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.quarto-accordion .accordion-button {
  background-color: #0a58ca;
  color: white;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.quarto-accordion .accordion-button:not(.collapsed) {
  background-color: #ade8f4;           
  color: #000000;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.quarto-accordion .accordion-body {
  background-color: #f8f9fa;          
  color: #212529;
}




//

```

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

:::

:::

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdjQwM3o1czJzejR3dDV2d25nY2ZqbmZ2dnNxeWF4Njd3dDBpZ2wzYSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/875ca3hG7COps5BsN1/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-120" bottom="30"}

:::

# Today...

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYzMyYXExOTYzZGM3NWIzdGp1NDFzbGVjbWxzNjdwdXBuNmY3cmc3ciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/pbIavlMZE7TkcVriMM/giphy.gif)

## [[Code Appendices]{.glitch .bigger}](https://github.com/cl-roberts/code-appendix)

Built--in option with RMarkdown, extension for Quarto

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

### [Quarto {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}](https://github.com/cl-roberts/code-appendix) 

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### [{{< iconify file-icons:rmarkdown style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} Markdown](https://pkg.yihui.org/rmarkdown-cookbook/code-appendix) 

:::

:::

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNHM1MWs4NjN0a3NxczIxem1mNWYzdm8waDM0MXo4ODcxeHRjeHRubyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/jfTDrYfZvlZja/giphy.gif){.absolute bottom="40" left="250"}

![](https://static.cambridge.org/content/id/urn%3Acambridge.org%3Aid%3Abook%3A9781139167246/resource/name/firstPage-9781139167246apx3_p236-252_CBO.jpg){.absolute right="-50" bottom="20" height="400"}

![](https://i.sstatic.net/NB1N1.png){.absolute left="-70" bottom="20" height="400"}

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`  

:::

:::
